lines.english: O my Merciful and Almighty God, O Great Giver,
he alone knows You, whom You so bless. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜੀਵਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਚਰਣ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jap jeevaa prabh charan tumaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I live by meditating on Your Feet, God. ||1||Pause||
Here and hereafter, I seek Your Protection. ||3||
Forever and ever, I am a sacrifice to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਗੁਣੁ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: mohi niragun gun kichhoo na jaataa |
lines.english: I am without virtue; I know none of Your Glorious Virtues.
O Nanak, seeing the Holy Saint, my mind is imbued with You. ||4||3||
Wadahans, Fifth Mehl:
God is perfect - He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.
I seek Your Protection, O Perfect Lord, Sustainer of the World. ||1||Pause||
Bless me with Your Grace, God, O Merciful to the meek.
He blesses us with the gift of the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||1||
He is totally pervading and permeating the water, the land and the sky.
God is near at hand, not far away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare so dhiaae |
lines.english: One whom He blesses with His Grace, meditates on Him.
Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord's Door. ||4||4||
He cherishes and sustains all beings and creatures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har ke gun gaae |3|
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||3||
Wadahans, Fifth Mehl:
You are the Great Giver, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh meh raviaa pooran prabh suaamee |1|
lines.english: God, the Perfect Lord and Master, is permeating and pervading in all. ||1||
I seek Your Sanctuary, O my Perfect True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਣਿ ਜੀਵਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau sun sun jeevaa naam tumaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I live by hearing, continually hearing Your Name. ||1||Pause||
The Name of my Beloved God is my only support.
I am a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan. ||3||
I have enshrined His Lotus Feet within my heart.
My mind is purified by the dust of the Saints. ||2||
Show mercy unto me, that I may sing Your Glorious Praises.
O Nanak, chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, I obtain peace. ||4||5||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord.
By great good fortune, one meets the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜੀਉ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਛੀਜੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naa jeeo marai na kabahoo chheejai |1|
lines.english: The soul does not die, nor does it ever waste away. ||1||
Wadahans, Fifth Mehl:
The Lord is the jewel, the pearl, the gem, the diamond.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te prabhoo dhiaaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one meditates on God. ||1||Pause||
Wherever I look, I see the Sanctuary of the Holy.
Meditating, meditating in remembrance on God, I am in ecstasy. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮਨੁ ਕਰਣਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har gun gaae niramal man karanaa |3|
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, my soul becomes immaculately pure. ||3||
Wadahans, Fifth Mehl:
O Nanak, one obtains the Naam, the Name of the Lord, when God bestows His Mercy. ||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਵੂਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt antar meraa suaamee vootthaa |
lines.english: Within each and every heart, dwells my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਚਿਤਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਸੋ ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeh chit aaveh so thaan suhaavaa |
lines.english: Wherever You come to mind, that place is blessed.
Do not forget me, O God, Merciful to the meek.
I seek Your Sanctuary, O Perfect, Compassionate Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੇ ਜੀਅ ਤੂ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਾਥੀ ॥
lines.translit: tere jeea too sad hee saathee |
lines.english: All beings are Yours; You are their constant companion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਵੇਲਾ ਵਿਸਰਹਿ ਤਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਹਾਵਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jit velaa visareh taa laagai haavaa |1|
lines.english: The moment I forget You, I am stricken with regret. ||1||
Coming and going are by Your Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਥੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis too raakheh tis dookh na theea |3|
lines.english: One whom You save is not afflicted by suffering. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਸਾਰ ਸਾਗਰ ਤੇ ਕਢੁ ਦੇ ਹਾਥੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sansaar saagar te kadt de haathee |2|
lines.english: Please, give me Your hand, and pull me up out of this world-ocean. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਏਕੋ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਹੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: too eko saahib avar na hor |
lines.english: You are the One and only Lord and Master; there is no other.
Nanak offers this prayer with his palms pressed together. ||4||7||
Wadahans, Fifth Mehl:
We chant Your Name, which You have given to us. ||1||
When You allow Yourself to be known, then we know You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਿਸਮਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: too acharaj kudarat teree bisamaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are wonderful! Your creative potency is amazing! ||1||Pause||
